title: psychotria pseudaxillaris
intro: Psychotria pseudaxillaris, also known as Yellow Monday, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Psychotria pseudaxillaris include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for pain relief and wound healing. Herbal preparations of Psychotria pseudaxillaris typically involve making teas or infusions from the leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
